pageTitle: ImiGaqo yoMthetho yeVirtualMD.app kunye noMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala

termsOfUse.title: Imimmiselo yokusebenzisa
termsOfUse.welcome: Wamkelekile kwiVirtualMD.app ("Inkonzo", "Indawo"), eqhutywa yi-MindScript Technologies, LLC ("MindScript", "thina", "thina", "yethu"). Le Miqathango yokuSetyenziswa ("iMiqathango") ilawula ukufikelela kwakho kunye nokusetyenziswa kwewebhusayithi yethu, abantu be-AI, umxholo kunye neenkonzo. Ngokufikelela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuba ubotshelelwe yile Miqathango kunye noMgaqo-nkqubo wethu waBucala, obandakanywe apha ngereferensi. Ukuba awuvumelani nale Miqathango, musa ukusebenzisa iNkonzo.

serviceDescription.title: 1. Inkcazelo yeNkonzo
serviceDescription.content: I-VirtualMD.app ibonelela ngofikelelo kubantu be-AI abaphambili abayilelwe ukunika ulwazi olunxulumene nempilo kunye nokuqonda okusekwe kuncwadi lwezonyango, izikhokelo zeklinikhi, kunye nedatha yoqeqesho lwe-AI. Le Nkonzo ilungiselelwe iinjongo zolwazi nezemfundo kuphela.
serviceDescription._comment: IDINGA UKUGUQULWA: Kuqiniswe ukuze kugxininiswe IINJONGO ZOLWAZI KUPHELA kunye nokubonisana nabasebenzi bezempilo abaqinisekisiweyo.

acceptanceOfTerms.title: 2. Ukwamkelwa kweMigaqo
acceptanceOfTerms.content: Ngokubhalisela, ukufikelela, ukukhangela, okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuba ufundile, waqonda, kwaye uyavuma ukuba ubotshelelwe yile Miqathango. Umele ukuba ukwiminyaka esemthethweni yokwenza isivumelwano esibophelelayo. Ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kuthetha utyikityo lwakho lwe-elektroniki kule Miqathango.

eligibility.title: 3. Ukufaneleka
eligibility.ageRequirement: Ukusebenzisa iNkonzo yeVirtualMD.app, kufuneka ubuncinci ube neminyaka eyi-18 okanye ubudala bobuninzi obusemthethweni kwindawo yakho, nokuba yeyiphi enkulu. Ukuba usebenzisa iNkonzo egameni lombutho, umela kwaye uqinisekisa ukuba unegunya lokubophelela lo mbutho kule Miqathango, kwaye uyavuma ukubotshelelwa yile Miqathango egameni lalo mbutho.
eligibility.legalCapacity: Kufuneka ube namandla asemthethweni ukuze ungene kule Miqathango. Awunakukwazi ukufikelela okanye ukusebenzisa iNkonzo ukuba akwalelwe ekufumaneni iinkonzo phantsi komthetho osebenzayo okanye ubukhe wanqunyanyiswa okanye wasuswa kwiNkonzo ngeMindScript.
eligibility.territorialRestrictions: Ukufikelela kwiNkonzo ukusuka kwimimandla apho umxholo wayo okanye ukusetyenziswa kwayo kungekho mthethweni kuthintelwe ngokungqongqo. Abasebenzisi banoxanduva lokuthobela yonke imithetho yasekhaya, imithetho, kunye nemimiselo malunga nokusetyenziswa kwabo kweNkonzo, kubandakanywa nezo zinxulumene nokuziphatha kwe-intanethi kunye nomxholo owamkelekileyo.

userAccounts.title: 4. IiAkhawunti zabasebenzisi kunye noBhaliso
userAccounts.registrationRequirements: Kusenokufuneka ubhalise kwaye wenze i-akhawunti ukufikelela kwiifitsha ezithile zeNkonzo. Xa ubhalisa, uyavuma ukubonelela ngolwazi oluchanekileyo, lwangoku, kunye nolwazi olupheleleyo malunga nawe kunye nokugcina kunye nokuhlaziya ulwazi lweakhawunti yakho ngokukhawuleza.
userAccounts.accountSecurity: Unoxanduva lokugcina ubumfihlo beenkcukacha zeakhawunti yakho kunye nayo yonke imisebenzi eyenzekayo phantsi kweakhawunti yakho. Uyavuma ukwazisa ngoko nangoko iMindScript ngako nakuphi na ukusetyenziswa okungagunyaziswanga kweakhawunti yakho okanye naluphi na olunye ulwaphulo lokhuseleko. IMindScript ayisayi kuba noxanduva ngayo nayiphi na ilahleko okanye umonakalo ovela ngenxa yokusilela kwakho ukukhusela ulwazi lweakhawunti yakho.
userAccounts.accountTermination: I-MindScript inelungelo lokunqumamisa okanye lokuvala ii-akhawunti ezaphula le Miqathango okanye ngaso nasiphi na esinye isizathu ngokokubona kwethu.
userAccounts.singleAccount: Umsebenzisi ngamnye unokugcina iakhawunti enye kuphela. Ukudala iiakhawunti ezininzi zomsebenzisi omnye akuvumelekanga ngaphandle kokuba kugunyaziswe ngokucacileyo yiMindScript.

intellectualProperty.title: 5. Amalungelo ePropati yoBukrelekrele
intellectualProperty.ownershipRights: Inkonzo kunye nemixholo yayo yonke, iimpawu, kunye nokusebenza (kubandakanya kodwa kungaphelelanga kulo lonke ulwazi, isoftware, okubhaliweyo, imiboniso, imifanekiso, ividiyo, iaudio, kunye noyilo, ukhetho, kunye nolungiselelo lwayo) zezeMindScript Technologies, LLC, abanikezeli bayo belayisenisi, okanye abanye ababoneleli bezinto ezinjalo kwaye bakhuselwe yiUnited States kunye ne-copyright yamazwe ngamazwe, uphawu lokuthengisa, i-patent okanye eminye imithetho yepropathi eyimfihlo, amalungelo obunikazi.
intellectualProperty.limitedLicense: Ngokuxhomekeke ekuthotyelweni kwakho nale Miqathango, iMindScript ikunika umnyino, ongakhethiyo, ongagqithiselekiyo, ongahlawulelwanga, iphepha-mvume elinokurhoxiswa ukufikelela kunye nokusebenzisa iNkonzo kuphela kusetyenziso lwakho lobuqu, olungelulo olorhwebo.
intellectualProperty.prohibitedUses: Ngaphandle kokuba kuvunyelwe ngokucacileyo kule Miqathango, awukwazi ukuvelisa kwakhona, ukusasaza, ukuguqula, ukwenza imisebenzi ephuma kuyo, ukubonisa esidlangalaleni, ukwenza esidlangalaleni, ukupapasha kwakhona, ukukhuphela, ukugcina, okanye ukuthumela nayiphi na into kwiNkonzo yethu ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliweyo ye-MindScript.
intellectualProperty.userContent: Ngokuthumela, ukuthumela, okanye ukubonisa umxholo okanye ngeNkonzo, unika i-MindScript i-MindScript yehlabathi jikelele, engabodwa, ilayisenisi yasimahla yokusebenzisa, ukuvelisa, ukuguqula, ukulungelelanisa, ukupapasha, ukuguqulela, ukudala imisebenzi ephuma kuyo, ukusabalalisa, kunye nokubonisa umxholo onjalo ngenjongo yokusebenza kunye nokuphucula iNkonzo.
intellectualProperty.feedback: Naziphi na izimvo, izimvo, okanye iingcebiso onokuthi uzinike malunga neNkonzo yeyokuzithandela ngokupheleleyo kwaye siya kukhululeka ukusebenzisa loo ngxelo, izimvo, okanye iingcebiso njengoko sibona kufanelekile ngaphandle kokukubophelela.

acceptableUse.title: Umgaqo-nkqubo wokusetyenziswa owamkelekileyo
acceptableUse.intro: Uyavuma ukusebenzisa iVirtualMD.app ngeenjongo ezisemthethweni kuphela kwaye ngokuhambelana nale Miqathango. Uyavuma ukungasebenzisi iNkonzo:

unlawful.title: Ngayo nayiphi na injongo engekho mthethweni
unlawful.description: Ukuquka ukwaphula nawuphi na umthetho osebenzayo, welizwe, wasekhaya, okanye wamazwe ngamazwe okanye ummiselo.

advertising.title: Ukuhambisa, okanye ukufumana ukuthunyelwa kwayo nayiphi na intengiso okanye imathiriyeli yokwazisa
advertising.description: Ngaphandle kwemvume yethu ebhaliweyo yangaphambili, kuquka nasiphi na 'iimeyile eziyinkunkuma', 'ileta yekhonkco', 'ispem', okanye naluphi na olunye ucelo olufanayo.

impersonate.title: Ukulinganisa okanye ukuzama ukulinganisa iMindScript
impersonate.description: Umsebenzi weMindScript, omnye umsebenzisi, okanye nawuphi na omnye umntu okanye iziko.

nefarious.title: Ngeenjongo ezimbi zalo naluphi na uhlobo
nefarious.description: Uvuma ngokucacileyo ukuba ungasebenzisi iNkonzo ukufuna ulwazi, isikhokelo, okanye iindlela ezinxulumene nokwenzakalisa wena okanye abanye. Oku kubandakanya, kodwa akuphelelanga apho, iindlela zokuphanda zokuzenzakalisa, ubundlobongela, izenzo ezingekho mthethweni, okanye nasiphi na isenzo esinokubeka wena okanye omnye umntu engozini. Ukusebenzisa iqonga ngezo njongo kukwaphulwa kwale Miqathango kwaye kunokubangela ukupheliswa kwe-akhawunti ngoko nangoko kunye nokuxela kwabasemagunyeni abafanelekileyo ukuba kufanelekile.

interference.title: Ngayo nayiphi na indlela ephazamisana nokusebenza ngokufanelekileyo kweNkonzo
interference.description: Kubandakanya ukwazisa iintsholongwane, amahashe etrojan, iintshulube, iibhombu zengqiqo, okanye ezinye izinto ezinobungozi okanye ezinobungozi kubuchwepheshe; ukuzama ukufumana ufikelelo olungagunyaziswanga, ukuphazamisa, ukonakalisa, okanye ukuphazamisa nayiphi na indawo yeNkonzo, iseva apho iNkonzo igcinwe khona, okanye nayiphi na iseva, ikhompyutha, okanye isiseko sedatha esiqhagamshelwe kwiNkonzo.

harmOthers.title: Ukwenzakalisa okanye ukuzama ukwenzakalisa abanye
harmOthers.description: Kubandakanya kodwa kungaphelelanga ekusebenziseni ulwazi olusuka kwiNkonzo ukwenza umonakalo ngokwasemzimbeni, ngokweemvakalelo, okanye ngokwasengqondweni kuye nawuphi na umntu.

harmAnimals.title: Ukwenzakalisa okanye ukuzama ukwenzakalisa izilwanyana
harmAnimals.description: Kubandakanya ukusebenzisa iNkonzo ukufumana ulwazi olujoliswe ukubangela ukubandezeleka, ukwenzakala, okanye ukufa kuso nasiphi na isilwanyana.

asIs.title: 1. Inkonzo ebonelelwe "NJENGOKO ZINJALO"; ULWAZI KUPHELA
asIs.content: Ulwazi kunye neenkonzo ezibonelelwa yiVirtualMD.app, kubandakanywa wonke umxholo owenziwe yi-AI personas, zinikezelwa "NJENGOKO ZINJALO" kunye "NJENGOKO ZIFUMANEKA" ngesiseko solwazi kunye neNJONGO YEMFUNDO KUPHELA. I-MindScript ayenzi lumelo okanye iziqinisekiso zalo naluphi na uhlobo, olucacileyo okanye oluthe ngqo, malunga nokusebenza kweNkonzo okanye ulwazi, umxholo, izixhobo, okanye iimveliso ezibandakanyiweyo kwiNkonzo. Uyavuma ngokucacileyo ukuba ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kumngcipheko wakho kuphela.
asIs.warning: I-VirtualMD.app INGCEBISO KUPHELA. Ayisiyokuthatha indawo yeengcebiso zonyango zobungcali, ukuxilongwa, okanye unyango oluvela kumboneleli wezempilo oqeqeshiweyo. Ngalo lonke ixesha ufune iingcebiso kugqirha wakho okanye omnye umboneleli wezempilo oqeqeshiweyo ngayo nayiphi na imibuzo onokuba nayo malunga nemeko yonyango. Ungaze utyeshele ingcebiso yezonyango okanye ulibazise ekuyifuneni ngenxa yento oyifundileyo okanye odibene nayo kwiNkonzo.
asIs.limitations: I-MindScript ayiboneleli ngoxilongo lwezonyango okanye unyango. Umxholo owenziwe yi-AI unokuqulatha iimpazamo okanye izinto ezishiyiweyo ngaphandle kweenkqubo zethu zokuqinisekisa. Iingcebiso zonyango zifuna uvavanyo lomntu ngamnye ngababoneleli bezempilo abanelayisensi. Ulwazi lwezempilo lusenokuphelelwa lixesha. Imbali yakho yonyango eyodwa ifuna uvandlakanyo lobuchwephesha.
asIs.fdaWarning: INkonzo, umxholo wayo, kunye nabantu bayo be-AI AKUVUNYWA yi-U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) okanye naliphi na elinye iqumrhu elilawulayo njengesixhobo sonyango okanye ngeenjongo zokuxilonga okanye zonyango.
asIs._comment: IDINGA UKUGUQULWA: Kutshintshwe 'ingcebiso' ukuya 'kulwazi' kuyo yonke indawo, kugxininiswe ukubonisana nabasebenzi abaqinisekisiweyo bezempilo.

noHipaa.title: 2. Akukho ukuthotyelwa kwe-HIPAA yokusetyenziswa ngokubanzi
noHipaa.content: Uvuma ngokucacileyo kwaye uyavuma ukuba i-VirtualMD.app, ekunikezelweni kwayo kwenkonzo ejongene nabathengi ngokubanzi, AYIKHO INKONZO YE-HIPAA-NGOKUTHOBELA ngenjongo yokusetyenziswa yi-HIPAA yamaQumrhu aKhuselweyo okanye abaNxibelelwano babo boShishino abalawula iNgcaciso yezeMpilo eKhuselweyo (PHI) njengoko kuchazwe phantsi koMthetho wokuThuthwa kwe-Inshurensi yezeMpilo kunye nokuPhenduka kwe-196 (HIPAA6).
noHipaa.details: Ngelixa i-MindScript isebenzisa imilinganiselo yokhuseleko oluqinileyo (ecacisiweyo kwicandelo loMgaqo-nkqubo woBucala), ulwakhiwo lweqonga, ukuphathwa kwedatha, kunye neenkqubo zokusebenza zenkonzo jikelele azihlangabezani neemfuno ezithile zolawulo, ezomzimba, nezobuchwephesha ezigunyaziswe nguMgaqo woKhuseleko we-HIPAA wokuphatha i-PHI ngamaQumrhu aKhuselweyo okanye abaNxibelelwano boShishino basebenza egameni labo ngaphandle kweSivumelwano esizinikezelweyo kwiSivumelwano soShishino (BA) kwindawo ethile.
noHipaa.agreement: Ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuba AWUYI kuyisebenzisa ukugcina, inkqubo, okanye ukuthumela i-PHI ngendlela eya kufuna ukuthotyelwa kwe-HIPAA kwicala le-MindScript, ngaphandle kokuba ungene kwi-BAA eyahlukileyo, esebenzayo kunye ne-MindScript Technologies, LLC ngenjongo ethile, ekuvunyelwene ngayo. Uyavuma ukuba umgangatho osebenzayo wokhuseleko lwedatha kulwazi olunikezayo lolo lwezenzo zokhuseleko lweshishini olufanelekileyo ngaphakathi eUnited States, hayi imigangatho ethile egunyaziswe yi-HIPAA ye-PHI.

dataSecurity.title: 3. Unyino lweTyala ngokumalunga noKhuseleko lweDatha
dataSecurity.content: I-MindScript isebenzisa imilinganiselo yokhuseleko oluqiqileyo kurhwebo, kuquka uguqulelo oluntsonkothileyo kunye neeprothokholi zoqinisekiso (njengoko kucacisiwe kuMgaqo-nkqubo wethu waBucala), ukukhusela ulwazi olunikezelayo kwiNkonzo. Nangona kunjalo, akukho nkqubo yokhuseleko ingangeneki.
dataSecurity.warning: Ke ngoko, ngokusebenzisa le Site, uyavuma kwaye uyavuma ukuba ngelixa i-MindScript iya kwenza iinzame ezifanelekileyo zokukhusela idatha yakho ngokuhambelana neendlela eziqhelekileyo zoshishino, ASIQINISEKISI UKHUSELEKO OLUPHELELEYO LOLWAZI LWAKHO. Uyavuma ukuba AWUKWAZI KWAYE AWUYI KUBANGALA OKANYE UKUBAMBA I-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, ITS AFFILIATES, AMAGOSA, ABALAWULI, ABAQESHWA, II-AGENTS, OKANYE AMAPHEPHA-MVUME AXHOMEKEKO ngawo nawuphi na umonakalo, ilahleko, iindleko, okanye iindleko ezivela okanye ngokunxulumene naluphi na ufikelelo, ukusetyenziswa okungagunyaziswanga, ulwazi olungagunyaziswanga. (kubandakanywa nokuphulwa kwedatha), ngaphandle kokuba i-MindScript iphumeze imilinganiselo yokhuseleko efanelekileyo. Ukusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo kuthetha ukwamkela kwakho lo mngcipheko.

generalLiability.title: 4. Umda ngokubanzi woButyala
generalLiability.content:
NGOKUPHELELEYO KUVUNYIWE NGOMTHETHO OSEBENZAYO, AKUKHO SIGANEKO IYA KUYI-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, AMAGQEBA AYO, AMAGOSA, ABALAWULI, ABAQESHWA, II-ARENTE, OKANYE ABANTU ABANEPHEPHA-MVUME BATHWELE UXANDUVA NGALUPHI NA I-INDIRECT, INDLELA, INDLELA YOKUZIPHATHA. UMONAKALO OWOHLWAYO, OKANYE NAYIPHI NA UKULAHLEKELWA KWENZUZO OKANYE INGENISO, UKUBA KWENZEKE NGQO OKANYE NGOKUNGCINGQI, OKANYE NAKUPHI NA UKULAHLEKELWA KWEDATHA, UKUSETYENZISWA, I-GOODWILL, OKANYE IILAHLEKO ENGASEKHO, EPHUMA

Nasiphi na isiqulatho esifunyenwe kule NKONZO; OKANYE
UKUFIKELELA, UKUSETYENZISWA KOKUNGAGUNYAZWAYO, OKANYE UKUTSHINTSHWA OKANYE UMQULATHO WAKHO (KUHLANGANISA ULWAPHULO LWEENKCUKACHA), NANGONA UKUBA I-MINDSCRIPT IPHUMZE IMIQATHANGO YOKHUSELEKO ENGQIQIWEYO KULE MIGAQO KUNYE NOMGAQO-NKQUBO WASEMFIHLO.

NGOKUPHELELEYO KUVUNYIWE NGOKOMTHETHO, IMINDSCRIPT IZIBAKALA ZONKE IZIQINISEKISO, EZISEMANDLA OKANYE EZINGCACISIWEYO, KUHLANGANISA, KODWA AKUMDALWA, IZIQINISEKISO EZITHENGISIWEYO ZOKUTHENGISA, UKULUNGELA NGENJONGO, NENJONGO, NEINJONGO ETHILE.

AKUKHO MFANEKISO UXANDUVA LWEMINDSCRIPT KUNYE NEZIBANDAKANYA EZINGXOXWAYO KUNYE NEZIBANDAKANYA EZINGAKUMBI ZINGAPHEZU KWEXESHA ELIKHULU LE-USD 100.00 (USD $100.00) OKANYE ISIXA OWUHLAWULAYO ​​I-MINDSCRIPT, UKUBA NAZIKHO, KWIINYANGA EZINTANDATHU EZINGADLULEYO KWIINYANGA EZINTANDATHU ZOKURHULUKELA.

IMIDA YELI CANDELWANA IYA KUSEBENZA KUYO NAYIPHI NA ITHIYORI YOBUXHOXO, EKUNOKUBA ISESEKELWE KWIWARANTI, KWIMVUMELWANO, UMTHETHO, TORT (KUHUKA KUNGAkhathali), OKANYE NGENXA YENZA, KWAYE, OKANYE AKUKHO INGCACISO YENGQONDO EYENZIWEYO, KUNYE NOBUXHOXA, NOBUXHOBA. EMINYE IMITHETHO AYIKUVUMELI UKUNGABANDWA KOMTHETHO OZITHILE OKANYE UMNIKELO OKANYE OKANYE UKUNGATHINTSHI UXANDUVA NGESEhlo OKANYE OKUPHUMELELEYO. NGOKUTSHOYO, EMINYE YALE MIDA ingentla isenokungasebenzi KUWE.

emergency.title: 5. Iimeko eziNgxamisekileyo
emergency.content: I-VirtualMD.app AYIKWAZI ukwenza egameni lakho ngexesha likaxakeka. Ukuba inkqubo icebisa ukuba ufowunele iinkonzo zongxamiseko (umzekelo, 911, 999, 101, 000) okanye ufune unyango olukhawulezileyo, unoxanduva kuphela lokuthatha elo nyathelo. INkonzo ayithumeli iinkonzo zikaxakeka. Hlala uthembele kwiinkonzo zongxamiseko zengingqi kwiimfuno zonyango ezingxamisekileyo.

privacyPolicy.title: Umthetho wabucala
privacyPolicy.intro: Lo Mgaqo-nkqubo waBucala ucacisa indlela iMindScript Technologies, LLC eqokelela ngayo, isebenzisa, kwaye ibhengeze ulwazi malunga nawe ngewebhusayithi yethu yeVirtualMD.app kunye neenkonzo. Lo mgaqo-nkqubo ubandakanywe kwiMigqaliselo yethu yokuSebenzisa.

dataPledge.title: 1. Isibambiso sethu saBucala beDatha
dataPledge.content: KwiVirtualMD.app, ubumfihlo kunye nokhuseleko lolwazi lwakho lobuqu lubaluleke kakhulu. Sizimisele ukugcina ubumfihlo kunye nokuthembeka kwedatha osiphathise yona. Iqonga lethu liyilwe ngamanyathelo okhuseleko olomeleleyo ukukhusela ulwazi lwakho ekufikeleleni okungagunyaziswanga, ukubhengezwa, ukuguqulwa, kunye nokutshatyalaliswa.

security.title: Iinzame zoKhuseleko:
security.description: Sisebenzisa iiprothokholi zofihlo zomgangatho woshishino lwedatha xa uthuthwa kwaye uphumle, ecaleni kolwakhiwo lokhuseleko olunemigangatho emininzi kubandakanya isinyanzelo se-2FA.

noPII.title: Akukho Ukusetyenziswa kwaNgaphandle kwePII:
noPII.description: Asisebenzisi ulwazi lwakho ngayo nayiphi na indlela yokuchonga umntu ngeenjongo zangaphandle ngaphandle kwemvume yakho ecacileyo.

noSale.title: Akukho Thengisi yoLwazi loBuqu:
noSale.description: Asinakuze sithengise iinkcukacha zakho kubantu besithathu.

anonymized.title: Idata engaziwayo yoPhuculo:
anonymized.description: Sisebenzisa ngokungqongqo idatha engaziwa kwaye ehlanganisiweyo (isuswe yonke i-PII) ukuphucula ukuchaneka, ukusebenza, kunye nokhuseleko lweemodeli zethu ze-AI kunye neempawu zeqonga. Oku akuvumeli ukuchongwa kwakhe nawuphi na umsebenzisi.

infoCollection.title: 2. Ulwazi esiluqokelelayo kunye nezinye iiNkcukacha zaBucala
infoCollection.content: Siqokelela ulwazi osinika lona ngokuthe ngqo, ulwazi esiluqokelela ngokuzenzekelayo ngokusebenzisa kwakho iNkonzo, kunye nolwazi oluvela kwimithombo yomntu wesithathu.
infoCollection.accountInfo: Ulwazi ngeAkhawunti: Xa ubhalisa, siqokelela ulwazi olufana negama lakho, idilesi ye-imeyile kunye nenombolo yefowuni (ngeenjongo zokuqinisekisa).
infoCollection.userContent: Umxholo woMsebenzisi: Siqokelela ulwazi olunikezayo xa usebenzisa iNkonzo, kuquka umbhalo ongeniswa kwincoko yencoko, ulwazi lweprofayile (njengoluhlu lwamayeza, ukuba lunikiwe), kunye nengxelo.
infoCollection.usageInfo: Ulwazi Lokusetyenziswa: Siqokelela ngokuzenzekelayo ulwazi malunga nokusebenzisana kwakho neNkonzo, njengedilesi ye-IP, uhlobo lwebrawuza, ulwazi lwesixhobo, inkqubo yokusebenza, amaphepha ajongweyo, amakhonkco acofayo, kunye nemihla kunye namaxesha otyelelo lwakho.
infoCollection.cookies: Iikuki kunye nobuChwephesha obufanayo: Sisebenzisa iikuki kunye neetekhnoloji zokulandelela ezifanayo ukulandelela umsebenzi kwiNkonzo yethu kunye nokubamba ulwazi oluthile. Ungayalela isikhangeli sakho ukuba sale zonke iikuki okanye ubonise xa icookie ithunyelwa. Nangona kunjalo, ukuba awuzamkeli iikuki, usenokungakwazi ukusebenzisa ezinye iinxalenye zeNkonzo yethu.

howWeUse.title: Indlela Esilusebenzisa Ngayo Ulwazi
howWeUse.intro: Sisebenzisa ulwazi esiluqokelelayo ngeenjongo ezahlukeneyo, kuquka:

howWeShare.title: Indlela Esabelana Ngayo Ngolwazi
howWeShare.vendors: Nabathengisi kunye nabaBoneleli beNkonzo: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi nabathengisi bomntu wesithathu, abacebisi, kunye nabanye ababoneleli ngeenkonzo abafuna ukufikelela kulwazi olunjalo ukuze benze umsebenzi egameni lethu.
howWeShare.legal: Ekuphenduleni iNkqubo yezoMthetho: Sinokuthi siveze ulwazi ukuba kufuneka senze njalo ngokomthetho okanye ngenkolelo efanelekileyo yokuba isenzo esinjalo siyimfuneko ukuthobela isibophelelo somthetho.
howWeShare.consent: NgeMvume Yakho: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi ngemvume yakho okanye ngokwesikhokelo sakho.
howWeShare.businessTransfers: Uweliselo lweShishini: Sisenokwabelana okanye sidlulisele ulwazi ngokunxulumene nako nakuphi na ukudityaniswa, ukuthengiswa kwee-asethi zenkampani, ukuxhaswa ngemali, okanye ukufunyanwa.
howWeShare.aggregated: Idatha eHlanganisiweyo okanye engachongwanga: Sinokwabelana ngolwazi oludityanisiweyo okanye olungachazwanga, olungenakusetyenziswa ngokufanelekileyo ukukuchonga.

choices.title: Ukhetho lwakho lwabucala
choices.accountInfo: Ulwazi ngeakhawunti: Ungahlaziya, ulungise, okanye ucime ulwazi ngawe nangaliphi na ixesha ngokungena kwiakhawunti yakho okanye ngokuqhagamshelana nathi.
choices.deletion: Ukucinywa kwedatha: Unezixhobo zokucima ngokusisigxina iincoko zomntu okanye iakhawunti yakho yonke.
choices.cookies: Iikuki: Iibhrawuza ezininzi zewebhu zisetelwe ukuba zamkele iikuki ngokuzenzekelayo. Unokukhetha ukuseta isikhangeli sakho ukuba sisuse okanye sale iikuki zebrawuza.
choices.promotional: UNxibelelwano lweNtengiso: Ungaphuma ekufumaneni ii-imeyile zentengiso kwi-MindScript ngokulandela imiyalelo ekwezo imeyile.

infoCollection.retention: Ugcino lweenkcukacha: Sigcina ulwazi esiluqokelelayo malunga nawe ixesha elide njengoko luyimfuneko ngokwenjongo (ii) esasiyiqokelele yona ekuqaleni. Sigcina ulwazi lwe-akhawunti okoko i-akhawunti yakho isebenza kunye nexesha elifanelekileyo emva koko.
infoCollection.international: Ukudluliselwa kweeDatha zaMazwe ngaMazwe: I-MindScript isekwe e-United States, kwaye siqhuba kwaye sigcina ulwazi e-US Ngokusebenzisa iNkonzo, uyavuma ukuthunyelwa kolwazi lwakho e-U.S.
infoCollection.children: Ubungasese baBantwana: INkonzo ilungiselelwe abantu abadala kwaye ayibhekiswanga kubantwana abangaphantsi kweminyaka eyi-13. Asiqokeleli ulwazi lobuqu kubantwana ngamabomu.

securityPractices.title: 5. Izenzo zoKhuseleko zeVirtualMD.app

password.title: Uguqulelo Lwegama Lokugqithisa:
password.description: Amagama okugqithisa abhalwe ngokuntsonkothileyo kusetyenziswa i-hashing algorithms yomgangatho woshishino.

twoFactor.title: Uqinisekiso Lwezinto Ezimbini (2FA):
twoFactor.description: Isinyanzelo kuzo zonke ii-akhawunti, ezifuna ukuqinisekiswa ngokusebenzisa into yesibini (umzekelo, ikhowudi kwi-imeyile / ifowuni).

threeFactor.title: Uqinisekiso Lwezinto Ezintathu (3FA) Ukhetho:
threeFactor.description: Ukhuseleko olongeziweyo ngokuzikhethela olufuna igama lokugqitha, ikhowudi ye-imeyile, KUNYE nekhowudi yeSMS.

dataEncryption.title: Ufihlo lwedatha:
dataEncryption.description: Ulwazi (kuquka iincoko) luguqulelwe ngokuntsonkothileyo xa uphumle kwaye usendleleni (TLS/SSL).

deletion.title: Ukucinywa kweDatha eSisigxina:
deletion.description: Ungazicima ngokusisigxina iincoko zomntu okanye iakhawunti yakho yonke. Ulwazi olucinyiweyo alufumaneki kwiinkqubo zethu eziphambili.

access.title: Ulawulo loFikelelo:
access.description: Ukufikelela kwiirekhodi zesiseko sedatha ngabasebenzi kulawulwa ngokungqongqo, kulinganiselwe, kufakwe, kwaye kulawulwa yimigaqo-nkqubo yangaphakathi. Ukhangelo zincwadi lwesiqhelo aluvumelekanga.

securityPractices.conclusion: La manyathelo abonelela ngokhuseleko oluluqilima lweakhawunti, kodwa khumbula ukuba akukho nkqubo ikhuselekile nge-100%.

hipaaReiteration.title: 6. I-VirtualMD.app kunye neeNgqwalaselo ze-HIPAA (Ukuphindaphinda)
hipaaReiteration.content: Njengoko kuchaziwe kwiZityalo zokuziQwalasela, inkonzo yeVirtualMD.app jikelele AYIKHO HIPAA ethobelayo kwiZiko eli-Inshoriweyo / uMnxulumanisi weShishini amatyala okusebenzisa abandakanya i-PHI ngaphandle kwe-BAA ethile. Ngelixa siphumeza ukhuseleko oluluqilima, inkonzo yethu jikelele isebenza phantsi kweendlela zokhuseleko ezisemgangathweni, hayi iimfuno ezithile zoMthetho woKhuseleko we-HIPAA we-PHI olawulwa ngamaQumrhu a-Inshoriweyo.
hipaaReiteration.warning: Abasebenzisi abafuna ukuthotyelwa kwe-HIPAA ngokungqongqo kwi-PHI abayilawulayo akufanele basebenzise iqonga lethu jikelele ngeenjongo ezinjalo ngaphandle kwe-BAA. Abasebenzisi akufanele bafake ulwazi olunokulandelwa kwizigulane ngamnye kumxholo ophula i-HIPAA ngaphandle kwemvume ecacileyo, enolwazi evumayo i-platform ye-non-HIPAA yokuthobela isimo sokusetyenziswa.

thirdParty.title: 7. Ukusetyenziswa kwedatha ngababoneleli beNjini ye-AI yeQela lesithathu
thirdParty.intro: I-MindScript idibanisa nababoneleli bemodeli be-AI abakhokelayo (umzekelo, i-OpenAI, i-Anthropic, i-Google).

mindscript.title: VirtualMD.app:
mindscript.description: Sisebenzisa kuphela idatha engaziwa, edityanisiweyo yokuphucula inkqubo yangaphakathi.

providers.title: Ababoneleli be-API beqela lesithathu:
providers.description: Ababoneleli abakhulu abafikelelwe nge-API (efana ne-OpenAI, i-Anthropic) ngokuqhelekileyo bachaza kwimigaqo-nkqubo yabo ukuba idatha efakwe nge-API AYISETYENZISIWE ukuqeqesha imifuziselo yesiseko sabo ngokubanzi. Simisela ukusetyenziswa kwethu kwezi nkonzo ukuze zihambelane nolu khetho lokugcinwa kwabucala. Phonononga imigaqo-nkqubo yabo ethile ngeenkcukacha.

changesToTerms.title: Utshintsho kule Miqathango kunye nePolisi
changesToTerms.content: Sinokuyihlaziya kwaye siyihlaziye le Miqathango amaxesha ngamaxesha ngokokubona kwethu. Lonke utshintsho lusebenza ngokukhawuleza xa siluthumela, kwaye lusebenza kuko konke ukufikelela kunye nokusetyenziswa kweNkonzo emva koko.
changesToTerms.notice: Ukusetyenziswa kwakho okuqhubekayo kweNkonzo kulandela ukuthunyelwa kweMigaqo ehlaziyiweyo kuthetha ukuba uyalwamkela kwaye uyavumelana notshintsho. Kulindeleke ukuba ujonge eli phepha rhoqo ukuze ube nolwazi ngalo naluphi na utshintsho, njengoko lukubophelela kuwe.
changesToTerms.materialChanges: Ukuba senza utshintsho kwizinto eziphathekayo kule Miqathango, siya kukwazisa nge-imeyile kunye/okanye ngokuthumela isaziso kwiNkonzo ngaphambi kokuba utshintsho lusebenze.

termination.title: Ukupheliswa
termination.userTermination: Ungayivala iakhawunti yakho kwaye uyeke ukusebenzisa iNkonzo nangaliphi na ixesha ngokulandela imiyalelo engaphakathi kwiNkonzo okanye uqhagamshelane nathi.
termination.serviceTermination: IMindScript inokuthi, ngokokubona kwayo, ikumise okanye ikuphelise ukufikelela kwakho kuyo yonke okanye inxalenye yeNkonzo, ngesaziso okanye ngaphandle kwesaziso, ngaso nasiphi na isizathu, kubandakanywa ukwaphulwa kwale Miqathango.
termination.effectOfTermination: Emva kokupheliswa, ilungelo lakho lokusebenzisa iNkonzo liya kuphela ngokukhawuleza. Onke amalungiselelo eMiqathango ekufuneka ngokwendalo yawo aphile ekuyekisweni aya kusinda ekuyekisweni.
termination.noLiability: Asiyi kuba noxanduva kuwe okanye nakweliphi na iqela lesithathu ngalo naluphi na ukupheliswa kokufikelela kwakho kwiNkonzo.

governingLaw.title: UMthetho oLawulayo kunye noSombululo lweeMbango
governingLaw.governingLaw: Le Miqathango iya kulawulwa kwaye icaciswe ngokuhambelana nemithetho yeState of Delaware, ngaphandle kokujongana nokungqubana kwemigaqo yomthetho.
governingLaw.jurisdiction: Uyavuma ukungenisa kulawulo lobuqu kunye nolukhethekileyo lweenkundla ezibekwe ngaphakathi kweNew Castle County, eDelaware.
governingLaw.arbitration: Nayiphi na imbambano evela okanye enxulumene nale Miqathango okanye iNkonzo iya kusonjululwa ngolamlo olubophelelayo ngokuhambelana neMithetho yoRhwebo yoRhwebo yoMbutho wokuLawula i-American.
governingLaw.classAction: Uyavuma ukuba naziphi na iinkqubo zokusombulula impikiswano ziya kuqhutywa kuphela kumntu ngamnye kwaye hayi kwinqanaba, elidityanisiweyo, okanye isenzo sommeli.
governingLaw._comment: IDINGA UKUGUQULWA: Ihlaziywe kumthetho waseDelaware kunye nolawulo lwaseMassachusetts

contact.title: Iinkcukacha zoqhakamshelwano
contact.content: Ukuba unayo nayiphi na imibuzo malunga nale Miqathango okanye uMgaqo-nkqubo waBucala, nceda uqhagamshelane nathi: <emailLink>legal@virtualmd.app</emailLink> okanye uqhagamshelane nathi iphepha lethu.

miscellaneous.title: Iintlobo ngeentlobo
miscellaneous.entireAgreement: Le Miqathango yenza isivumelwano sonke phakathi kwakho neMindScript malunga nokusetyenziswa kweNkonzo.
miscellaneous.severability: Ukuba naliphi na ilungiselelo lale Miqathango libanjwe njengelingasebenziyo okanye alinakunyanzeliswa, izibonelelo eziseleyo ziya kuqhubeka zisebenza ngokupheleleyo kwaye zisebenza.
miscellaneous.waiver: Ukusilela kweMindScript ekunyanzeliseni naliphi na ilungelo okanye ulungiselelo lwale Miqathango akusayi kuthathwa njengokurhoxisa ilungelo okanye ulungiselelo olunjalo.
miscellaneous.assignment: Awunakukwazi ukunika okanye ukudlulisa le Miqathango, ngokusebenza komthetho okanye ngenye indlela, ngaphandle kwemvume ebhaliweyo yeMindScript ebhalwe ngaphambili.
